title: legion.span.v1
description: One unit of metered work by any Legion executor, using model roles resolved from the Legion catalog. Appended as JSONL to $LEGION_TELEMETRY_DIR/<date>.jsonl by legion-delegate, the runners, and legion-telemetry. Consumed by legion-aggregate / legion-report / legion-otel-export / legion-self-learn.

trace_id.description: groups spans of one multi-agent run; defaults to run_id

target_type.description: Optional catalog entity type for self-learning attribution, e.g. plugin, skill, command, agent, hook, mcp.

target_name.description: Optional catalog entity name for self-learning attribution.
